proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=1` have a higher `objective_response` rate than patients with `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=0`.
Patients with `treatment_7plus3=1` have a higher `objective_response` rate than patients with `treatment_7plus3=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted response was 21.96% with `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=1` versus 16.61% without it; risk difference +5.35 percentage points.
Unadjusted response was 18.89% with `treatment_7plus3=1` versus 18.63% without it; risk difference +0.26 percentage points.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `treatment_midostaurin=1` have a higher `objective_response` rate than patients with `treatment_midostaurin=0`.
Patients with `treatment_gilteritinib=1` have a higher `objective_response` rate than patients with `treatment_gilteritinib=0`.
Patients with `treatment_ivosidenib=1` have a higher `objective_response` rate than patients with `treatment_ivosidenib=0`.
Patients with `treatment_enasidenib=1` have a higher `objective_response` rate than patients with `treatment_enasidenib=0`.

analyses.result_summary: `treatment_midostaurin` showed no positive main effect; risk difference -0.21 percentage points.
`treatment_gilteritinib` showed no positive main effect; risk difference -0.73 percentage points.
`treatment_ivosidenib` showed no meaningful main effect; risk difference +0.07 percentage points.
`treatment_enasidenib` showed no positive main effect; risk difference -0.18 percentage points.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `npm1_mutation=1` have a higher `objective_response` rate than patients with `npm1_mutation=0`.
Patients with `flt3_itd=1` have a higher `objective_response` rate than patients with `flt3_itd=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Response was 23.46% with `npm1_mutation=1` versus 16.73% with `npm1_mutation=0`; risk difference +6.74 percentage points.
`flt3_itd` had almost no unadjusted association with response; risk difference +0.21 percentage points.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `tp53_mutation=1` have a lower `objective_response` rate than patients with `tp53_mutation=0`.
Patients with `complex_karyotype=1` have a lower `objective_response` rate than patients with `complex_karyotype=0`.
Patients with either `tp53_mutation=1` or `complex_karyotype=1` have a lower `objective_response` rate than patients with neither adverse feature.

analyses.result_summary: Response was 16.57% with `tp53_mutation=1` versus 18.99% with `tp53_mutation=0`; risk difference -2.42 percentage points.
Response was 16.81% with `complex_karyotype=1` versus 19.09% with `complex_karyotype=0`; risk difference -2.29 percentage points.
Patients with `tp53_mutation=1` or `complex_karyotype=1` had response 16.76% versus 19.36% in those with neither feature; risk difference -2.60 percentage points.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `idh1_mutation=1` have a higher `objective_response` rate than patients with `idh1_mutation=0`.
Patients with `idh2_mutation=1` have a higher `objective_response` rate than patients with `idh2_mutation=0`.
Patients with `flt3_tkd=1` have a lower `objective_response` rate than patients with `flt3_tkd=0`.

analyses.result_summary: `idh1_mutation` had a small non-significant positive difference; risk difference +0.37 percentage points.
`idh2_mutation` had a small non-significant positive difference; risk difference +0.44 percentage points.
`flt3_tkd` had a non-significant lower response rate; risk difference -0.75 percentage points.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `unfit_for_intensive=1` have a higher `objective_response` rate than patients with `unfit_for_intensive=0`.
Patients with `ecog_ps>=2` have a lower `objective_response` rate than patients with `ecog_ps<2`.

analyses.result_summary: Response was 22.10% for `unfit_for_intensive=1` versus 16.51% for `unfit_for_intensive=0`; risk difference +5.59 percentage points.
Response was 12.91% for `ecog_ps>=2` versus 19.77% for `ecog_ps<2`; risk difference -6.86 percentage points.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `age_years>=75` have a lower `objective_response` rate than patients with `age_years<75`.
Patients with `sex_female=1` have a higher `objective_response` rate than patients with `sex_female=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Response was 18.70% for `age_years>=75` versus 18.77% for younger patients; risk difference -0.07 percentage points.
`sex_female=1` had response 18.91% versus 18.62% for `sex_female=0`; risk difference +0.29 percentage points.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients in the upper quartile of `blast_pct_marrow` have a lower `objective_response` rate than patients in the lower quartile.
Patients in the upper quartile of `wbc_k_per_ul` have a lower `objective_response` rate than patients in the lower quartile.
Patients in the upper quartile of `ldh_u_l` have a lower `objective_response` rate than patients in the lower quartile.

analyses.result_summary: Top-quartile `blast_pct_marrow` (>=73.3) had response 16.64% versus 20.65% in the bottom quartile (<=46.6); risk difference -4.01 percentage points.
Top-quartile `wbc_k_per_ul` (>=24.1) had response 17.60% versus 19.89% in the bottom quartile (<=6.2); risk difference -2.29 percentage points.
Top-quartile `ldh_u_l` had response 18.46% versus 19.24% in the bottom quartile; risk difference -0.78 percentage points.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients in the upper quartile of `weight_loss_pct_6mo` have a lower `objective_response` rate than patients in the lower quartile.
Patients in the upper quartile of `albumin_g_dl` have a higher `objective_response` rate than patients in the lower quartile.
Patients in the upper quartile of `crp_mg_l` have a lower `objective_response` rate than patients in the lower quartile.

analyses.result_summary: Top-quartile `weight_loss_pct_6mo` (>=6.4) had response 15.72% versus 20.46% in the bottom quartile; risk difference -4.74 percentage points.
Top-quartile `albumin_g_dl` (>=4.1) had response 19.78% versus 17.53% in the bottom quartile (<=3.5); risk difference +2.25 percentage points.
Top-quartile `crp_mg_l` (>=7.04) had response 17.22% versus 19.46% in the bottom quartile; risk difference -2.24 percentage points.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for treatments, mutations, clinical fitness, and disease-burden labs, `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=1` remains positively associated with `objective_response`.
After adjustment for treatments, mutations, clinical fitness, and disease-burden labs, `npm1_mutation=1` remains positively associated with `objective_response`.
After adjustment for treatments, mutations, clinical fitness, and disease-burden labs, each one-point increase in `ecog_ps` is associated with a lower `objective_response` probability.

analyses.result_summary: Robust linear probability model coefficient for `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` was +0.0542.
Robust linear probability model coefficient for `npm1_mutation` was +0.0675.
Robust linear probability model coefficient for `ecog_ps` was -0.0522 per point.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment, `tp53_mutation=1` remains negatively associated with `objective_response`.
After adjustment, `complex_karyotype=1` remains negatively associated with `objective_response`.
After adjustment, `unfit_for_intensive=1` remains positively associated with `objective_response`.

analyses.result_summary: Robust linear probability model coefficient for `tp53_mutation` was -0.0263.
Robust linear probability model coefficient for `complex_karyotype` was -0.0239.
Robust linear probability model coefficient for `unfit_for_intensive` was +0.0562.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment, higher `albumin_g_dl` is associated with higher `objective_response` probability.
After adjustment, higher `crp_mg_l` is associated with lower `objective_response` probability.
After adjustment, higher `blast_pct_marrow` is associated with lower `objective_response` probability.
After adjustment, higher `weight_loss_pct_6mo` is associated with lower `objective_response` probability.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `albumin_g_dl` was +0.0181 per g/dL.
Adjusted coefficient for `log1p(crp_mg_l)` was -0.0111.
Adjusted coefficient for `blast_pct_marrow` scaled per 10 percentage points was -0.0077.
Adjusted coefficient for `weight_loss_pct_6mo` was -0.0052 per percentage point.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The response advantage associated with `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=1` is larger in patients with `npm1_mutation=1` than in patients with `npm1_mutation=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted risk-difference interaction: venetoclax/azacitidine effect was +18.69 percentage points in `npm1_mutation=1` versus -0.39 percentage points in `npm1_mutation=0`; difference-in-differences +19.08 percentage points.
Adjusted robust linear probability interaction `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine * npm1_mutation` was +0.1911.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The response advantage associated with `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=1` is larger in patients with `unfit_for_intensive=1` than in patients with `unfit_for_intensive=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted venetoclax/azacitidine effect was +14.51 percentage points in `unfit_for_intensive=1` versus -0.77 percentage points in `unfit_for_intensive=0`; difference-in-differences +15.28 percentage points.
Adjusted robust linear probability interaction `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine * unfit_for_intensive` was +0.1522.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with both `npm1_mutation=1` and `unfit_for_intensive=1`, `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=1` is associated with a higher `objective_response` rate than no venetoclax/azacitidine.

analyses.result_summary: Within the `npm1_mutation=1` and `unfit_for_intensive=1` subgroup, response was 63.31% with venetoclax/azacitidine versus 15.96% without it; risk difference +47.35 percentage points.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The response advantage associated with `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=1` is smaller in patients with `tp53_mutation=1` than in patients with `tp53_mutation=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted venetoclax/azacitidine effect was -0.36 percentage points in `tp53_mutation=1` versus +6.00 percentage points in `tp53_mutation=0`; difference-in-differences -6.36 percentage points.
Adjusted robust linear probability interaction `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine * tp53_mutation` was -0.0684.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The response advantage associated with `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=1` is smaller in patients with `complex_karyotype=1` than in patients with `complex_karyotype=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted venetoclax/azacitidine effect was +1.15 percentage points in `complex_karyotype=1` versus +6.09 percentage points in `complex_karyotype=0`; difference-in-differences -4.94 percentage points.
Adjusted robust linear probability interaction `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine * complex_karyotype` was -0.0516.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `tp53_mutation=1` or `complex_karyotype=1`, `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=1` is associated with a higher `objective_response` rate than no venetoclax/azacitidine.
Among patients with `tp53_mutation=0` and `complex_karyotype=0`, `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine=1` is associated with a higher `objective_response` rate than no venetoclax/azacitidine.

analyses.result_summary: In patients with `tp53_mutation=1` or `complex_karyotype=1`, venetoclax/azacitidine response was only 0.65 percentage points higher than no venetoclax/azacitidine and was not significant.
In patients with neither `tp53_mutation` nor `complex_karyotype`, venetoclax/azacitidine response was 6.81 percentage points higher than no venetoclax/azacitidine.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The response advantage associated with `treatment_7plus3=1` is smaller in patients with `complex_karyotype=1` than in patients with `complex_karyotype=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Unadjusted `treatment_7plus3` effect was -2.32 percentage points in `complex_karyotype=1` versus +0.72 percentage points in `complex_karyotype=0`; difference-in-differences -3.04 percentage points.
Adjusted robust linear probability interaction `treatment_7plus3 * complex_karyotype` was -0.0316.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The response advantage associated with `treatment_7plus3=1` is smaller in patients with `unfit_for_intensive=1` than in patients with `unfit_for_intensive=0`.
The response advantage associated with `treatment_7plus3=1` is smaller in patients with `npm1_mutation=1` than in patients with `npm1_mutation=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted robust interaction `treatment_7plus3 * unfit_for_intensive` was small and non-significant.
Unadjusted `treatment_7plus3 * npm1_mutation` difference-in-differences was -1.18 percentage points and non-significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The response advantage associated with `treatment_midostaurin=1` is larger in patients with `flt3_itd=1` than in patients with `flt3_itd=0`.
The response advantage associated with `treatment_gilteritinib=1` is larger in patients with `flt3_itd=1` than in patients with `flt3_itd=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted robust interaction `treatment_midostaurin * flt3_itd` was negative rather than positive and non-significant.
Adjusted robust interaction `treatment_gilteritinib * flt3_itd` was small and non-significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The response advantage associated with `treatment_ivosidenib=1` is larger in patients with `idh1_mutation=1` than in patients with `idh1_mutation=0`.
The response advantage associated with `treatment_enasidenib=1` is larger in patients with `idh2_mutation=1` than in patients with `idh2_mutation=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted robust interaction `treatment_ivosidenib * idh1_mutation` was significantly negative, opposite the hypothesized positive predictive effect.
Adjusted robust interaction `treatment_enasidenib * idh2_mutation` was near zero and non-significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The favorable response association of `npm1_mutation=1` is larger in patients with `flt3_itd=1` than in patients with `flt3_itd=0`.
The adverse response association of `tp53_mutation=1` is more negative in patients with `complex_karyotype=1` than in patients with `complex_karyotype=0`.
The adverse response association of `tp53_mutation=1` is more negative in patients with `secondary_aml=1` than in patients with `secondary_aml=0`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction `npm1_mutation * flt3_itd` was -0.0045 and non-significant.
Adjusted interaction `tp53_mutation * complex_karyotype` was +0.0177 and non-significant, not a more-negative combined effect.
Adjusted interaction `secondary_aml * tp53_mutation` was +0.0041 and non-significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `secondary_aml=1` have a lower `objective_response` rate than patients with `secondary_aml=0`.

Patients with any of `liver_mets`, `bone_mets`, `adrenal_mets`, `pleural_effusion`, `pericardial_effusion`, or `contralateral_lung_mets` set to 1 have a lower `objective_response` rate than patients with all of those fields set to 0.

analyses.result_summary: `secondary_aml` had response 18.81% versus 18.73%; risk difference +0.08 percentage points, opposite the hypothesized adverse direction and non-significant.
The combined non-AML metastasis/effusion indicator had response 18.67% versus 18.85%; risk difference -0.17 percentage points and non-significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment, `flt3_itd=1` remains positively associated with `objective_response`.
After adjustment, `idh1_mutation=1` remains positively associated with `objective_response`.
After adjustment, `idh2_mutation=1` remains positively associated with `objective_response`.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `flt3_itd` was +0.0009 and non-significant.
Adjusted coefficient for `idh1_mutation` was +0.0043 and non-significant.
Adjusted coefficient for `idh2_mutation` was +0.0024 and non-significant.
